rooms.title: LA Hackathon Loft
rooms.theme: Winning the Worlds in Action Hackathon in Los Angeles
rooms.marblePrompt: A small, cozy loft studio with exposed red brick walls, dark wooden floorboards, and warm overhead timber beams wrapped in delicate string lights. To the left, a heavy industrial window looks out onto a soft, warm orange sunset. A single sleek wooden desk sits against one wall, holding a modern laptop and a tangled cluster of white cables. Nearby, a black metal shelving unit displays a small framed photo of a crowded industrial venue and a handmade paper card. The room feels quiet, intimate, and celebrated, illuminated by warm pools of light.
rooms.rationale: The entire LA trip and hackathon victory form a single coherent event entity. They are preserved in a single cozy brick-and-timber loft room that references the industrial aesthetic of the venue while remaining intimate and human-scaled.

memories.label: The Hackathon Venue
memories.note: The buzzing energy of the industrial warehouse filled with hundreds of creators.
memories.rationale: Placed as a framed print on the metal shelving unit, letting the visitor inspect the crowded venue from the calm of the studio.
memories.objectPrompt: A small black-framed photo showing a bustling indoor space with string lights and brick walls.

memories.label: The Hacking Desk
memories.note: The intense focus, coding, and sketching out ideas under pressure.
memories.rationale: Positioned on the main wooden desk next to the workspace to recall the feeling of creation.
memories.objectPrompt: A crumpled piece of white paper with handwritten diagrams and sketches, sitting next to a grey pen.

memories.label: Victory Cake
memories.note: Celebrating with Amina and the team after a successful submission.
memories.rationale: Placed near the window sill to represent a lighthearted moment of rest and victory.
memories.objectPrompt: A small white ceramic plate holding a slice of pink-frosted cake with a bite taken out of it.

memories.label: Hacker Lanyard
memories.note: The official hacker credentials worn throughout the intense event.
memories.rationale: Draped over the corner of the wooden desk as a souvenir left behind.
memories.objectPrompt: A black fabric lanyard with a laminated plastic ID badge attached to it.
